title: Arcomua Lite
description: Lite version of Arcomua Modpack. Focus on optimization and some QoLs without compromising performance.
body:
> We don't have time to update this modpack any further, so if you need it, please use [Arcomua Cloth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcomua) instead.

[![Cover](https://github.com/Arcomua/Arcomua-Lite/assets/88249678/c5af2ae2-db76-4ce2-9072-fe9ce43ddecf)](#arcoma-lite)

**Arcomua Lite** is a fork from [Arcomua Cloth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcomua) mainly designed to reach higher FPS and more vanilla than the original modpack.

### ⚡ High Performance

Many optimization mods were included to ensure the game reaches the highest performance.

### ✨ QoL Improvements

Many QoL mods were featured in this modpack to make your gameplay more enjoyable and make your eyes comfortable, such as Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, Litematica, and Redstone display resource pack.

## Advantages over the standard version

###  ⚡ Higher efficiency

Removed most decorative mods, as they usually sacrificed some FPS for better visual effects. You deserve a higher frame rate.

### ⚖️ Performance Balancing

Compared to the Vanilla, this version has better bug fixes and game performance optimizations, your game won't eat a lot of memory in one breath, and the CPU won't warm up for you when the game starts up, so enjoy the gaming environment without the sound of fans!

###  🪄 Minimalist Design

Without some mods that provided unnecessary functionalities, like mini-map and world map. These mods cost a lot of FPS, removing them will also make the game closer to vanilla and easier to play.

## Why choose us?

Compared to other more similar modpacks, our modpack has the following advantages:

### 🔁 Long-term Update

Rest assured that I will be diligently updating this modpack to ensure it remains fully compatible with the latest version of vanilla.

### 🆕 Adopting New Technologies

We continuously experiment with and utilize the latest technologies to provide a more efficient and improved user experience.

### 📖 Comprehensive Problem-solving Guidance

We want you to know that we genuinely care about your experience and are here to help with any issues you may encounter. We aim to provide clear and detailed instructions to make problem-solving a breeze. Don't hesitate to reach out if you need any assistance!

### 🍎 macOS and Apple Silicon Support

We made a series of optimizations for Mac users to make the game more playable on macOS.
